content:
Divisional Revenues and Consolidated Growth

Aoura Group has released its annual operating review, highlighting strong commercial performance across its primary business divisions. Supported by growing B2B supply contracts and a rising demand for specialized e-commerce operations in the Gulf, consolidated revenue grew by 38% year-over-year.

Performance Breakdown by Division

Both core businesses delivered exceptional results:

  • Aoura Products: Contributed 58% of consolidated revenue, driven by robust wholesale supplies contracts, corporate warehouse equipment orders, and B2B shipping consumables distribution.
  • Aoura E-commerce Services: Contributed 42% of revenue, witnessing a 75% increase in brands under management and marketplace consulting fees.
"Our focus on building high-value B2B relationships and optimizing digital infrastructure has delivered strong growth, positioning Aoura Group for continued regional expansion."

Future Outlook

Over the next fiscal year, the group will continue to invest in warehouse infrastructure, explore supply chain integrations in Saudi Arabia, and scale e-commerce management capacity to meet the demands of international clients entering the region.
